name: cancel-near-completion
description: Scenario A / I2 cancellation point 3 (near completion) — derived from the inferbench IB-T004 cancel-mid-stream profile (inferbench@caa5074; seed kept). Mutations recorded: cancel point moved from 8 to 240 output tokens (>=93.75% of the mock's 256-token output cap, so a realized cancel is genuinely near stream completion) and request_count raised 30->200 because the mock's seeded-uniform output length (1..256) exceeds 240 tokens for only ~1/16 of requests — expected ~12 realized cancels, the rest complete ok before the trigger (honest planned-vs-realized accounting per the inferbench run log). Expected realized cancels: status=canceled with output_tokens_at_cancel=240; mock /debug/state aborts phase=mid_stream, chunks_sent>=241.
